name: dotlight-marketplace
description: Marketplace for DotLightSkillset — a lightweight curated Claude Code skillset for .NET developers

plugins.name: dotlight-skillset
plugins.description: A lightweight curated Claude Code skillset for .NET developers — 0.7.0 makes NHibernate a first-class runtime citizen: new nhibernate-patterns skill (session-per-request, IStatelessSession, dirty-checking writes, fetch strategies, HQL bulk, Npgsql jsonb/enum, FluentMigrator/DbUp) + NH annotations across the EF-flavored skills. On 0.6.x: SessionStart hook (deterministic triage + skill discipline), wired review chain, upstream sync, lazy-senior-dev, database-design-conventions + database-review.
